Table VI
(A) Following the amended version of Sri Raja Gopala
lyyer we have to count the nakshatras from Dhanishtha and
the weekdays from Friday. Keeping this in mind and to avoid
confusion we have given the numbers to the constellations as
they become when they are counted from Asvini. The Vighatis
are those we get as remainder after the birth ghatis are
divided by 63.
Vighatis Constellation
1,10,19,28,37 ,46,55 8,17,26
2,11,20,29,38,47,56 2,11,20
3,12,21,30,39,48,57 7,16,25
4,13,22,31,40,49,58 2,11,20
5,14,23,32,41,50,59 6,15,24
6,15,24,33,42,51,60 1,10,19
7,16,25,34,43,52,61 5,14,23
8,17 ,26,35,46,53,62 9,18,27
9,18,27 ,36,45,54,63 4,13,22
1n this method the weekdays are given for the Vighatis of
the remainder. The weekdays are counted from Friday. But to
avoid confusion we are mentioning the weekday clearly.
Vighatis Weekdays
1,8,15,22,29,36,43,50,57 Sunday
2,9, 16,23,30,37 ,44,51,58 Wednesday
